summary.markdown_formatted:
### [Introductions and family life @ 0:00](https://fathom.video/share/cYJuMsYxnrvzuecu_cojwYj6Vw_79_aC?tab=summary&timestamp=0)

Vanessa and Ben discuss their busy family lives, with Vanessa having a 9-month-old and a 4.5-year-old, and Ben having a busy household with his wife and young children as well. They bond over the challenges and joys of raising young kids.

### [Vanessa's investment focus and challenges @ 3:19](https://fathom.video/share/cYJuMsYxnrvzuecu_cojwYj6Vw_79_aC?tab=summary&timestamp=199)

Vanessa explains that she invests in companies doing good for the world, particularly in the climate space. She discusses the challenges her team faces in managing their workflows, tools, and processes, including deal sourcing, note-taking, and due diligence. She is looking for ways to streamline and automate these tasks.

### [Ben's background and AI automation expertise @ 7:58](https://fathom.video/share/cYJuMsYxnrvzuecu_cojwYj6Vw_79_aC?tab=summary&timestamp=478)

Ben shares his background in building digital products, communities, and becoming an authority on topics like AI and automation. He explains how he has created his own AI assistant to automate repetitive tasks and increase his productivity. He offers to set up a similar AI assistant for Vanessa's team to help with their key challenges.

### [Proposed AI assistant solution @ 9:35](https://fathom.video/share/cYJuMsYxnrvzuecu_cojwYj6Vw_79_aC?tab=summary&timestamp=575)

Ben outlines how the AI assistant would work, connecting to Vanessa's existing tools and allowing her team to automate deal sourcing, note-taking, and due diligence processes. He explains the setup and ongoing costs, and Vanessa expresses interest in moving forward, pending further discussion with her colleague.

### [Next steps and additional resources @ 25:47](https://fathom.video/share/cYJuMsYxnrvzuecu_cojwYj6Vw_79_aC?tab=summary&timestamp=1547)

Ben offers to provide Vanessa with additional resources and information on AI and automation to help educate herself and her partner. Vanessa agrees to discuss the proposal further with her colleague and get back to Ben on next steps.
